action.reasoning: Observation: test_preprocess and test_obs failed due to incomplete RecordingEvaluator (no super().__init__ call leading to missing eval_tasks), missing 'action' key in batch causing KeyError in AddBatchDimensionProcessorStep (all formats failed at that step), and truncated predict.py. PI0 loads and initializes OK. Analysis: Processor pipeline (RenameObservations -> AddBatchDimension etc.) is training-oriented and strictly requires 'action' key in transition dict even for inference (per diagnostic output); adding dummy action + proper super init in evaluator subclass will fix crashes. View selection, delta scaling (increased to 0.1), gripper mapping, action chunking, and RecordingEvaluator (with evaluate_single_episode calling super per contract + full main for eval_config.json) align with guidance for Pi0 adaptation track. Mock test will now validate end-to-end without attribute errors. Decision: Provide complete predict.py with fixed batch (add dummy_action tensor), full RecordingEvaluator subclass (proper __init__ with json handling + overrides), updated tests; run diagnostics. If preprocess succeeds and mock passes, submit_eval immediately for real success_rate (expect >0.0 now that fallback is avoided and bridge is improved). No training yet - validate pipeline first. This matches early baseline plan and measures time.
